title: Template Detail
notFound: Template not found or has been deleted.

section.infoDesc: Core properties and current status of the template.
section.networkDesc: Network type and outbound traffic rules for this template.
section.replicasDesc: Snapshot replicas of this template across nodes.
section.compatDesc: Component versions bound to template replicas compared with the current node environment.
section.dangerDesc: This action cannot be undone. All replicas of this template will also be deleted.

rebuild.confirmDesc: This will trigger a template rebuild. The template will be unavailable for creating new sandboxes during the process. Continue?

delete.confirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All replicas of this template will also be deleted. Continue?

building: Template is being built. Please refresh in a moment.

compat.staleTitle: This template needs rebuilding for the current node environment
compat.staleDesc: {{count}} replica has guest-image or cube-agent versions that differ from the current node. The template build status can still be ready, but these replicas cannot create new sandboxes.
